lessons.allowed_use: Advisory precedent only; current forecast, risk, spread, event, and gateway checks remain authoritative.
lessons.blocked_behavior: Do not replay the 2025 USD_JPY precedent as a USD_JPY-only rule or as permission to ignore other pairs.

case_study.lesson: Major-figure/intervention fade needs thesis invalidation, not a tight noise-zone broker SL.

lessons.lesson: A trade shape starts from the current theme, not from a single pair memory.
lessons.reusable_rule: Map the cleanest expression of the bought/sold currency theme, then select pair/vehicle only after current evidence confirms the theme.

lessons.allowed_use: Advisory precedent only; current forecast, risk, spread, event, and gateway checks remain authoritative.
lessons.blocked_behavior: Block sell-the-low / buy-the-high churn unless a separate breakout/trend proof exists.
lessons.lesson: 24h location is a first-class edge filter.
lessons.reusable_rule: Prefer pair-agnostic broad-discount LONG and broad-premium SHORT structures when they match current thesis and risk geometry.

lessons.allowed_use: Advisory precedent only; current forecast, risk, spread, event, and gateway checks remain authoritative.
lessons.blocked_behavior: Do not infer H4 support from H1-only data; missing H4 is a data gap, not permission.

evidence.h4_gap: H4 was not fully reconstructed for 2025 manual rows.

lessons.lesson: H1/H4 alignment must be evidence, not a slogan.
lessons.reusable_rule: Use H1/H4 as current context buckets and require extra current reason when the current alignment conflicts with the positive bounded precedent.

lessons.allowed_use: Advisory precedent only; current forecast, risk, spread, event, and gateway checks remain authoritative.
lessons.blocked_behavior: Do not force the same vehicle in Tokyo, London, NY overlap, and off-hours without session-specific evidence.
lessons.lesson: Session changes payoff and should shape aggressiveness.
lessons.reusable_rule: Rank session-conditioned shapes separately and prefer the current liquid/session-compatible expression.

lessons.allowed_use: Advisory precedent only; current forecast, risk, spread, event, and gateway checks remain authoritative.
lessons.blocked_behavior: Block martingale-style averaging, margin rescue, or adds whose only reason is a red open P/L.
lessons.lesson: Adverse adds were only useful when bounded and thesis-specific.
lessons.reusable_rule: An adverse add can only be considered when invalidation, max entries, margin, and harvest path are explicit before the add.

lessons.allowed_use: Advisory precedent only; current forecast, risk, spread, event, and gateway checks remain authoritative.
lessons.blocked_behavior: Block stack-on-green behavior when the new layer lacks its own entry location, TP, invalidation, and margin proof.
lessons.lesson: With-move pyramiding was not automatically positive in bounded replay.
lessons.reusable_rule: Pyramids need independent fresh edge and portfolio room; a move already in profit is not enough.

lessons.allowed_use: Advisory precedent only; current forecast, risk, spread, event, and gateway checks remain authoritative.
lessons.blocked_behavior: Block tight broker SLs inside normal noise/major-figure battle zones and block loss-side closes from red P/L alone.

case_study.lesson: Major-figure/intervention fade needs thesis invalidation, not a tight noise-zone broker SL.

lessons.lesson: SL-free does not mean loss-free; it means exits must be thesis invalidation based.
lessons.reusable_rule: When using SL-free or wide-catastrophe-stop logic, store the thesis, invalidation level/timeframe, and review trigger before entry.

lessons.allowed_use: Advisory precedent only; current forecast, risk, spread, event, and gateway checks remain authoritative.
lessons.blocked_behavior: Block market-close leakage where one large give-up close erases multiple average winners.
lessons.lesson: Harvest exits are the reusable profit engine; housekeeping must not become panic closing.
lessons.reusable_rule: Prefer attached TP / harvest / profit capture when current forecast weakens or range rail is reached.

lessons.allowed_use: Advisory precedent only; current forecast, risk, spread, event, and gateway checks remain authoritative.
lessons.blocked_behavior: Block any target policy that requires trading through margin pressure to maintain a daily cadence.
lessons.lesson: Margin closeout is a hard failure mode, not a strategy exit.
lessons.reusable_rule: Treat margin capacity as pre-entry and add-layer risk control; once margin pressure appears, do not add risk to rescue the basket.

lessons.allowed_use: Advisory precedent only; current forecast, risk, spread, event, and gateway checks remain authoritative.
lessons.blocked_behavior: Block using raw long-hold winners to justify unattended exposure without current thesis-evolution and margin controls.
lessons.lesson: Long unattended holds contaminate precedent because they mix thesis edge with carry tail risk.
lessons.reusable_rule: Separate bounded intraday precedent from >=12h carry/tail rows before citing edge.

source_sample.pair_agnostic_constraint: The observed 2025 sample is USD_JPY-heavy, so lessons are expressed as theme/location/session/shape contracts, not as pair-specific permission.
